TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alex_Acker, title = Alex_Acker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alex_Acker} }

S.FORM: Alex Acker hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw tay suruw. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 1, Alex Acker, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Alex Acker, t'aring kawas tay 2002 tehuk kawas tay 2005, mqwas biru sa Pepperdine pqwsan biru seneng, Compton, California, U.S. mintzyuwaw nya Alex Acker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. t'aring sa kawas 2005, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA ru mqwas. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Alex Acker hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw tay suruw. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 1, Alex Acker, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Alex Acker, t'aring kawas tay 2002 tehuk kawas tay 2005, mqwas biru sa Pepperdine pqwsan biru seneng, Compton, California, U.S. mintzyuwaw nya Alex Acker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. t'aring sa kawas 2005, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA ru mqwas. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: alex a ¶~ ®ker ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēaras~…ē mari Ē taj s~…ēuruw taj s~…ēuruw. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, alex a ¶~ ®ker, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pinqő≤aqan nja alex a ¶~ ®ker, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa pepper*ine pqws~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēeneŇč, ¶~ ®ompton, ¶~ ®ali*ornia, u.s~…ē. mintzjuwaw nja alex a ¶~ ®ker s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a. t ĒariŇč s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nő≤a ru mqwas~…ē. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
